mapper.select: SELECT * FROM subscription_announcement ORDER BY reception_start_dt DESC
SELECT * FROM subscription_announcement WHERE reception_start_dt <= CURRENT_DATE AND reception_end_dt >= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY reception_end_dt ASC
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subscription_announcement WHERE announce_no = #{announceNo})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subscription_announcement (announce_no, house_name, house_type, supply_addr, bjdong_code, lat, lng, total_supply, reception_start_dt, reception_end_dt, winner_announce_dt, min_price, max_price) VALUES (#{announceNo}, #{houseName}, #{houseType}, #{supplyAddr}, #{bjdongCode}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{totalSupply}, #{receptionStartDt}, #{receptionEndDt}, #{winnerAnnounceDt}, #{minPrice}, #{maxPrice})
mapper.update: UPDATE subscription_announcement SET lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng} WHERE id = #{id}
